overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a cyberpunk city street at night, following a pedestrian past neon-lit storefronts before ascending a concrete staircase to an elevated walkway overlooking the urban landscape. The footage exhibits high-fidelity game engine rendering with ray-traced neon lighting and reflective surfaces characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket, passing illuminated storefronts and moving traffic on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk before diverging toward the left staircase

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying neon graphics and text
commercial storefront with illuminated blue signage reading 'softsys'
storefront with red and blue neon signage reading 'cirrus'
massive concrete elevated highway structure spanning above the street
yellow and black striped construction barriers along the left sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night, walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. The camera follows a pedestrian in a yellow jacket past various storefronts including 'softsys' and 'cirrus', with moderate traffic flowing on the right side of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete pedestrian staircase between industrial buildings

events.description: entering covered concrete staircase from street level sidewalk
emerging from fully covered stairwell section to area with open sides and visible cityscape

agents.ego_description: climbing the long concrete staircase, passing pedestrians descending in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings ascending between building structures
building facade with blue neon signage reading 'DATA INC'
overhead fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, enclosed concrete stairwell illuminated by artificial fluorescent lighting. The camera ascends the stairs, passing descending pedestrians, with the DATA INC building visible on the left. Around the 35-second mark, the stairwell opens to the sides revealing glimpses of the cityscape below while continuing to climb.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking neon-lit city intersection

events.description: exiting staircase onto elevated walkway with panoramic view of the city intersection below
turning left to follow the elevated walkway along the DATA INC building facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated overlook observing the traffic and neon signs below, then turning left to continue along the walkway

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian walkway with metal railings overlooking the street below
panoramic view of the neon-lit city intersection with multiple skyscrapers and billboards
tall modern glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the staircase onto a semi-covered elevated walkway, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of the neon-drenched city intersection below. The camera walks along the overlook past the DATA INC building, observing the sparse traffic and glowing skyscrapers in the distance, before turning left to follow the walkway deeper into the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling neon-lit street level up to a panoramic elevated overlook of a cyberpunk cityscape. It begins by following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket along a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing storefronts like softsys and cirrus amidst flowing traffic. As the camera moves forward, the open street transitions into a narrow, fluorescent-lit concrete stairwell where it ascends past other pedestrians and the DATA INC building. The enclosed space then opens to the sides to reveal glimpses of the city before finally emerging onto a semi-covered walkway. This transition culminates in a breathtaking panoramic view of a neon-drenched intersection and glowing skyscrapers, with the camera walking along the overlook before turning left to venture deeper into the urban landscape.
